app.name: SOWISO
welcome.hero_subtitle: Elevate your communication and etiquette across cultures. Learn the traditions of different regions and build stronger, more meaningful relationships — wherever in the world you find yourself.
welcome.result_msg_flawless: You answered all three correctly. Your instincts are already well-formed. SOWISO will refine what is already exceptional.
welcome.result_msg_accomplished: Two of three — a commendable result. SOWISO will attend to the finer distinctions that separate the accomplished from the distinguished.
welcome.result_msg_promising: One of three. There is rich ground ahead. SOWISO will guide you through the invisible codes that govern the highest circles.
welcome.result_msg_nascent: The conventions of refinement are not born but cultivated. SOWISO exists for precisely this journey.
welcome.join_body: Continue your study of refinement. Track your Noble Score, train across five pillars of etiquette, and consult the Counsel on any situation — from dining in Paris to negotiating in Tokyo.
atelier.title: The Atelier
atelier.subtitle: Refine your instincts through practice. Select a scenario below to test your judgement in complex social and cultural situations.
atelier.guest.register_prompt: for access to all pillars and regions.
atelier.empty_region_hint: No training scenarios are currently available for
compass.quick_brief_subtitle: The five customs you must know before arrival
counsel.title: The Counsel
counsel.subtitle: Thirty seconds of discreet guidance. Describe your situation and receive an immediate, precise response.
counsel.region_prompt: You are seeking counsel for etiquette in
counsel.region_hint: Change via the region selector top right
counsel.session_override_hint: This region applies to this consultation only — your profile region is unchanged.
compass.title: The Cultural Compass
compass.subtitle: Navigate the customs of the world with precision and confidence.
compass.communication_presence_note: How presence, delivery, and language combine to convey distinction in this culture.
profile.title: The Profile
profile.domain_subtitle: Your titles across the five pillars of refinement.
profile.visit_atelier: Visit The Atelier to begin your journey.
profile.save_error: Could not save. Please try again.
profile.delete_account_warning: This will permanently remove your account, all progress, and your Noble Score history. This action cannot be undone.
profile.not_authenticated: Please sign in to view your profile.
auth.social_coming_soon: Sign in with social accounts is coming soon.
counsel.guest.limit_reached: You have used all {{limit}} free questions.
counsel.guest.limit_body: Create an account for unlimited access to all SOWISO modules.
counsel.guest.all_regions_prompt: Create an account for access to all regions.
counsel.guest.domain_register: This domain is available after registration.
counsel.guest.domain_register_body: Create a free account to access all domains and track your personal Noble Score.
counsel.guest.domain_premium: This domain requires a premium membership.
counsel.guest.domain_premium_body: Upgrade your subscription for access to all advanced domains, including Hospitality, Gifting and Digital Protocol.
counsel.guest.locked_domains_hint: Locked domains are available after registration.
counsel.guest.continue_body: You've experienced the preview. Create a free account to ask unlimited questions, track your Noble Score and explore all culture regions.
counsel.gate.guest_desc: This domain belongs to the repertoire of The Traveller. Shall we expand your access?
counsel.gate.limit_desc: You have employed your {{count}} complimentary consultations. Shall we expand your access?
accessibility.title: Accessibility
detect.banner_prefix: We noticed you might be visiting from
detect.banner_suffix: — would you like to set that as your region?
counsel.region_unavailable: This region is presently being curated. Counsel is available for the United Kingdom, China, and Canada.
pillar.1.name: The World Within
pillar.2.name: The Presence
pillar.3.name: The Voice
pillar.4.name: The Table
pillar.5.name: The Cellar
register.title: Create Your Account
register.subtitle: Begin your journey into the art of conduct.
register.sent_to: A verification link has been sent to
register.check_spam: If you do not receive the link within a few minutes, kindly inspect your junk folder.
verify.success_body: Your correspondence address has been confirmed. Welcome to SOWISO.
verify.already_body: Your address has already been confirmed. You may proceed.
verify.expired_body: This verification link is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
verify.invalid_body: This verification link is not recognised. Please check your correspondence or register again.
verify.error_body: A difficulty arose during verification. Please try again or request a new link.
register.error_email: Please enter a valid email address.
register.error_name: Please enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
register.error_birth_year_invalid: Please enter a valid birth year.
signin.title: Sign In
signin.subtitle: Return to your practice.
signin.sent_body_prefix: A sign-in link has been sent to
signin.sent_body_suffix: Follow the link to continue your practice.
onboarding.step1_subtitle: Your cultural background allows SOWISO to tailor its guidance to your perspective.
onboarding.step2_subtitle: Select one or more objectives that reflect your aspirations.
onboarding.obj_business_desc: Elevate your presence in business and professional settings.
onboarding.obj_elite_desc: Navigate aristocratic and high-society circles with confidence.
onboarding.obj_romantic_desc: Command admiration in intimate and romantic settings.
onboarding.obj_travel_desc: Move fluently across cultures and international environments.
onboarding.step3_subtitle: Your selections refine the scenarios and counsel you receive.
admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Search, review and manage member accounts.
admin.not_admin: This section is restricted to administrators.
ambition.curious.label: Curious

ambition.aspirational.label: Aspirational
ambition.professional.label: Professional
ambition.distinguished.label: Distinguished
ambition.diplomatic.label: Diplomatic
ambition.curious.desc: Exploring the foundations of refined conduct
ambition.casual.desc: Cultivating grace in everyday social settings
ambition.aspirational.desc: Actively refining one's presence and manners
ambition.distinguished.desc: Commanding elite social and formal environments
ambition.diplomatic.desc: International ceremony and protocol at the highest level
profile.interests_subtitle: These preferences guide your personalised exercises and recommendations across the platform.
profile.locked_field_hint: This field is permanently set and cannot be changed.
profile.full_name_taken: This display name is already in use by another member.
profile.username_taken: This username is already claimed by another member.
profile.avatar_too_large: Please choose an image smaller than 1.5 MB.
membership.title: The Three Standings
membership.subtitle: Every distinguished person begins as a guest. Where you journey from here is a matter of intention.
membership.footer_note: All memberships renew automatically and may be cancelled at any time
auth.dev_no_smtp_signin: No SMTP is configured. Use the link below to sign in.
auth.dev_no_smtp_register: No SMTP is configured. Use the link below to complete verification in this environment.
profile.compass.title: Refinement Compass
profile.compass.subtitle: Your social refinement profile develops as you practise across scenarios.
landing.region_intro: Select the etiquette context for your session
compass.cluster_brief_subtitle: The five essential do's and don'ts for this cultural world
compass.high_society_desc: Yacht etiquette, diplomatic address, continental gala protocol, and the invisible codes of Monaco and the European grand circuit. Reserved for those operating at the highest social register.
compass.hs_dining: Formal dining protocol at multi-course galas and state occasions.
compass.hs_dress: Dress distinctions: white tie, black tie, and morning dress hierarchies.
compass.hs_address: Correct forms of address for titled and diplomatic persons.
compass.hs_yacht: Yacht and charter etiquette on the Côte d'Azur and Adriatic.
compass.guest_hint: As a guest, one region is open to you.
clusters.anglosaxon.name: Anglo-Saxon World
clusters.western_europe.name: Continental Western Europe
clusters.western_europe.philosophy: Formality, precision, and the art of the considered gesture
clusters.romance.name: Romance & Mediterranean
clusters.romance.philosophy: Expression, aesthetics, and the theatre of the table
clusters.east_asian.name: East Asian Confucian
clusters.east_asian.philosophy: Face, harmony, and the eloquence of deference
clusters.arabic.name: Arabic World
clusters.arabic.philosophy: Hospitality, honour, and the sacred bond of the guest
clusters.south_asian.name: South Asian
clusters.south_asian.philosophy: Hierarchy, warmth, and the generosity of the threshold
clusters.latin_america.name: Latin America
clusters.latin_america.philosophy: Warmth, personalismo, and the pleasure of connection
clusters.ubuntu.name: Ubuntu & Southern Africa
clusters.ubuntu.philosophy: I am because we are — Ubuntu as etiquette
situations.title: Situations
situations.subtitle: Select a setting to access context-specific etiquette guidance, calibrated to your active region.
situations.restaurant.name: Restaurant
situations.restaurant.desc: Formal and fine dining etiquette — from arrival to departure.
situations.meeting.name: Business Meeting
situations.meeting.desc: Professional conduct in formal and cross-cultural business contexts.
situations.wedding.name: Wedding
situations.wedding.desc: Guest conduct, dress protocol, and cultural customs at celebrations.
situations.gala.name: Gala & Formal Event
situations.gala.desc: Black-tie and formal event conduct for distinguished occasions.
situations.greeting.name: Greetings
situations.greeting.desc: First encounters, forms of address, and meeting etiquette.
situations.gifting.name: Gift-Giving
situations.gifting.desc: The protocol of presenting and receiving gifts across cultures.
situations.yacht.name: Yacht & High Society
situations.yacht.desc: Maritime etiquette and the codes of the grand circuit.
situations.ambassador_note: Yacht & High Society is reserved for The Ambassador.
situations.counsel_cta_desc: Consult the Counsel for a tailored response to your situation.
counsel.situation_placeholder: Describe where you are going, e.g. a formal dinner in Tokyo, a business meeting in Dubai…
counsel.situation_hint: This context will be shared with The Counsel to calibrate its guidance.
